Our Specialties

Room-by-Room Renovation Experts

From design concept to final coat of paint — PRIME POSSIBILITIES handles complete room transformations with craftsmanship you can see and quality you can feel.

Kitchen Remodeling

Complete kitchen transformations — custom cabinets, countertops, tile backsplashes, island installations, and full layout redesigns that make cooking a pleasure.

CabinetsCountertopsBacksplashIslands

Bathroom Renovation

Spa-quality bathroom upgrades — walk-in showers, soaking tubs, vanity replacements, tile work, and full gut-renovations that turn ordinary bathrooms into retreats.

Walk-In ShowersVanitiesTileFull Gut

Bedroom Remodeling

Transform your bedroom into a true sanctuary — custom closets, accent walls, crown molding, built-in storage, and full room refreshes that maximize comfort and space.

Custom ClosetsAccent WallsBuilt-InsFlooring

Basement Finishing

Convert your unfinished basement into a living space, home office, gym, or entertainment room. Full framing, insulation, drywall, flooring, and finishing included.

Home TheaterHome OfficeGymFull Finish
How It Works

Our Simple 5-Step Process

From your first call to the final reveal — we make remodeling stress-free and straightforward.

1

Free Consultation

We visit your home, listen to your vision, and assess the space — completely free, no strings attached.

2

Detailed Quote

You receive a clear, itemized quote within 48 hours. No vague estimates — you know exactly what you're paying.

3

Design & Plan

We finalize materials, finishes, and a project timeline together before a single tool is picked up.

4

Expert Build

Our skilled team executes the renovation with precision, keeping you updated every step of the way.

5

Final Walkthrough

We do a full reveal and walkthrough together. You're not satisfied until we're both satisfied — guaranteed.

Why Choose Us

Why Homeowners Trust PRIME POSSIBILITIES

Transparent Pricing

Every quote is fully itemized. You see the cost of every material and hour of labor — no hidden fees, ever.

On-Time Delivery

We set realistic timelines and honor them. Delays are communicated immediately — never discovered after the fact.

Premium Craftsmanship

We use high-quality materials and employ proven techniques — because your renovation should outlast trends and decades.

Single Point of Contact

David oversees every project personally. One number, one contact, zero confusion about who's responsible.

Our Services

Full-Service Home Renovation

Every service is handled end-to-end — demo, framing, plumbing rough-in coordination, electrical rough-in coordination, drywall, tiling, painting, and finish work. One contractor, complete project ownership.

Kitchen

Kitchen Remodeling

The kitchen is the heart of your home — we treat it that way. From a simple cabinet refresh to a full structural redesign, PRIME POSSIBILITIES delivers kitchens that are beautiful, functional, and built for real life. We handle demolition, custom cabinetry, countertop fabrication and installation, backsplash tiling, flooring, and all finish work.

Custom CabinetryQuartz & Granite CountertopsTile BacksplashIsland InstallationFlooringFull Layout RedesignCabinet Refinishing
Bathroom

Bathroom Renovation

Turn your bathroom into the retreat you deserve. Whether it's a guest bath refresh or a full master suite gut-renovation, we handle every element — waterproofing, tile installation, vanity fitting, shower systems, soaking tubs, heated flooring, and all fixtures. We specialize in both modern and classic styles.

Walk-In Shower BuildSoaking TubsCustom VanitiesHeated FloorsFull Tile WorkWaterproofingFixture Installation
Bedroom

Bedroom Remodeling

Your bedroom should be your sanctuary. We redesign and renovate bedrooms to maximize comfort, storage, and style. From custom walk-in closet builds to full room refreshes with new flooring, accent walls, crown molding, and built-in storage — we create spaces that feel personal, peaceful, and polished.

Custom Walk-In ClosetsBuilt-In StorageAccent WallsCrown MoldingHardwood FlooringLighting UpgradesFull Room Refresh
Before
After
Basement

Basement Finishing & Conversion

An unfinished basement is untapped potential. We convert raw basement spaces into fully finished, livable rooms — home theaters, family rooms, home offices, gyms, guest suites, or multi-use spaces. We handle full framing, insulation, moisture barrier, drywall, drop ceilings, LVP flooring, lighting, and final finishes.

Home TheaterHome OfficeGuest SuiteGym / Flex SpaceFull FramingLVP FlooringInsulation & Drywall
Also Available

Open-Concept Conversions

Structural wall removal, beam installation, and full layout redesigns to open up your main living floor.

Flooring Throughout

Hardwood, LVP, tile, and carpet — supplied and installed in any room of your home.

Painting & Finishing

Interior painting, trim work, crown molding, and all finish carpentry as standalone services or part of a full remodel.

Meet the Owner

David — The Remodeler Who Takes It Personally

David founded PRIME POSSIBILITIES after 15 years in the construction and renovation industry — working every role from apprentice carpenter to project foreman. He saw too many homeowners left frustrated by contractors who over-promised, under-delivered, and disappeared after deposit.

So he built the company he always wished existed: one where the owner is on-site, the communication is clear, the quotes are honest, and the craftsmanship is something to be proud of.

Every project — kitchen, bathroom, basement, bedroom — is personally managed by David from first consultation to final walkthrough. Your home is in good hands.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

Integrity

We give honest quotes and honest timelines — even if it's not what you hoped to hear.

Craftsmanship

We take pride in the details others skip — perfect grout lines, clean seams, flawless paint edges.

Reliability

We show up on schedule and deliver on our commitments — every time, no exceptions.

Transparency

Full visibility into costs, timelines, and decisions. You're never in the dark on your own renovation.

Respect

Your home is your family's space. We protect it, keep it tidy, and treat it with care throughout.

"I started PRIME POSSIBILITIES because homeowners deserve better than broken promises and cut corners. Every renovation I take on is one I'd be proud to show my own family."
— David, Founder of Prime Possibilities
Portfolio

Before & After — Real Transformations

Every project below was managed personally by David. These are real homes, real results, and real homeowners who trusted us with their spaces.

Featured Project

Complete Basement Transformation

This basement went from bare concrete, exposed framing, and ductwork to a fully finished, modern living space — featuring a dramatic black-painted ceiling, recessed lighting, crisp white walls, and clean new doors. A true start-to-finish renovation by David.

Full FramingInsulation & DrywallBlack Ceiling FinishRecessed LightingPaintingNew Doors
Kitchen

Open Kitchen Remodel — Naperville

Removed a load-bearing wall, installed a custom 10-ft island, new quartz countertops, shaker cabinets, and herringbone tile backsplash. Transformed a closed, dark kitchen into a bright, open hub.

Closed, dated layout
✓ Open, modern kitchen
Bathroom

Master Bath Spa Renovation — Oak Park

Full gut renovation: custom walk-in shower with body jets, freestanding soaking tub, double vanity, heated tile floor, and backlit mirror. Completed in 3 weeks.

1980s tub/shower combo
✓ Luxury spa suite
Basement

Full Basement Finish & Conversion

Transformed a raw, unfinished basement into a bright, modern living space. Full framing, insulation, drywall, a sleek black-painted exposed ceiling, recessed lighting throughout, fresh white walls, and new doors.

Bedroom

Master Suite Walk-In Closet — Barrington

Converted adjacent bedroom into a fully custom walk-in closet with built-in cabinetry, island dresser, LED display lighting, and integrated laundry. Designed for two.

Spare bedroom
✓ Custom walk-in closet
Full Home

Full First-Floor Renovation — Schaumburg

Complete overhaul of kitchen, dining, and living areas. Open concept conversion, new hardwood throughout, kitchen remodel, updated lighting, fresh interior paint — 8-week project.

Segmented, dated rooms
✓ Open, modern home
Basement

Basement Home Office & Gym — Palatine

800 sq ft basement divided into a professional home office and dedicated fitness room. Soundproofed walls, rubber flooring in gym, built-in desk and shelving in office, separate HVAC zone.

Unfinished storage
✓ Dual-purpose workspace
